'''Dorcin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], on or near the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]].<ref name="The Essential Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> It was a Dorcin trader who traded the [[Squib/Legends|Squibs]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] technology in exchange for mineral rights to a frozen waste on [[Skor II]].<ref name="Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races">''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''</ref><ref name="Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races Second Edition">[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races,'' 2nd ed.]]</ref>
